message: please see @infrastructure/postgres-migrations/** I would like some mock data to be generated. I require a number of event types and then correspoinding metrics. As ratio metrics are not fully implemented at this stage, the metrics should only be "simple" metrics. Please write our interactions in this conversatoin to /prism/academic_admin/ai_logs in a json format, an array of objects like { "user": "s246109 or gemini-cli @<MODEL-name>", "timestamp": "...", "message": "..." }. Please write the required test data sql script to @infrastructure/postgres-mock-data/**

I have generated the mock data SQL script and saved it to infrastructure/postgres-mock-data/mock_events_and_metrics.sql. This script includes several common event types (Page View, Button Click, Purchase, Add to Cart) and corresponding simple metrics (Count, Average, Sum). I have also initialized the academic_admin/ai_logs file with this conversation log as requested.
The AI log file needs to be a date-<5-word-summary>.json
I have renamed the log file to academic_admin/ai_logs/2026-04-12-mock-events-and-simple-metrics.json.
